_meta.description: M10 first-level collections = LEMMA (lexeme), keyed by transliteration; folds Strong sense-suffixes and verb/noun pairs into one lemma per researcher direction (lemma only, no other breakouts). lemma_meaning from lexicon.

lemma_meaning: to sin, miss, miss the way, go wrong, incur guilt, forfeit, purify fro
to act unfaithfully, act treacherously, transgress, commit a trespass
(a.) sinful, as an absolute moral failure
to act treacherously, deceitfully, deal treacherously
trespass, transgression, sin against, to sin as a moral failure to kee
to twist, pervert, distort, overturn, ruin
unjust one, perverse one, unrighteous one
guilty, faulty (and obliged to offer a guilt-offering)
confusion (violation of nature or divine order)
a perversion, that which is perverted or warped, perverted
to join in one’s hypocrisy be hypocritical
